ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "gt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "gt_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., equipment, vehicle, facility) */,
  "gt_number" INTEGER /* Unique format number for the asset */,
  "gt_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "gt_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department ID where the asset is located */,
  "loc_id" INTEGER /* Location ID where the asset is located */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Asset status ID */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date of asset acquisition */,
  "depreciation_rate" REAL /* Rate of depreciation of the asset */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Purchase price of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_gt_type FOREIGN KEY ("gt_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "dept_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "dept_head" INTEGER /* User ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_dept_head FOREIGN KEY ("dept_head") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "loc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "loc_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "loc_address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "loc_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being maintained */,
  "maint_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "maint_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maint_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("gt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "usage_hours" REAL /* Number of hours the asset was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_usage_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("gt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., asset manager, maintenance personnel, admin) */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Department ID where the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID that this permission belongs to */,
  "perm_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "perm_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID that this role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID that is assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_maintenance_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset that this schedule is for */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance schedule */,
  "schedule_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_maintenance_schedule_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("gt_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_depreciation" (
  "depreciation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depreciation event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset that this depreciation is for */,
  "depreciation_date" TEXT /* Date of the depreciation event */,
  "depreciation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of depreciation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("depreciation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_depreciation_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("gt_id")
)
